channel.title: Employee Ownership on Carney
channel.description: Recent content in Employee Ownership on Carney

item.title: Don’t Be an Asshole
item.description: Leadership Isn’t a Spreadsheet (And Being an Asshole Is a Terrible Business Strategy) Leadership often gets reduced to spreadsheets, quarterly targets, and org charts that look like subway maps no one understands. But a growing body of evidence from private equity, academia, and real-world companies suggests something radical: If you stop being an asshole — and actually treat people like humans — your business performs better. Not “better vibes.” Better returns.
